bottles.name: Willett 18 Year Single Barrel Bourbon #1608 "It's Classified"
bottles.description: A huge 18 year old expression of single barrel bourbon from Willett sourced from an undisclosed Kentucky distillery. Named "It's Classified" barrel #1608 was bottled at 62.3% Abv with a small outturn of just 69 bottles produced.

bottles.name: Bowmore 30 Year Old Sea Dragon 1990s Bottling
bottles.description: A special age statement from Bowmore, this 30 year old matured expression was bottled in the 1990s in a unique black ceramic bottle featuring imagery of a sea dragon. The sea dragon release is notoriously sought after as the distillate inside is from the 1960s, a magical era for Bowmore that produced such legendary releases such as the 1964 Black Bowmores.

bottles.name: I.W. Harper 1917 16 Year Old Bottled In Bond
bottles.description: A pre-prohibition era bottling of bourbon from the I.W.Harper brand, an exceptionally popular label historically produced at the Bernheim distillery. This expression was distilled in 1917 and matured for 16 years before being bottled in bond at 100 proof in 1933.

bottles.name: Old Ramshead 1916 Bottled In Bond 1930
bottles.description: Distilled in 1916, this bourbon was protected in bond by the American Medicinal Spirits Company from the Prohibition Act of 1920, which made alcohol production and consumption illegal. The whiskey was produced at the Anderson Distillery distillery in 1916, then owned by the infamous Whiskey Trust. The Trust was accused of engaging in several illegal activities, including intimidation of distillery owners who did not want to sell up to them. They acquired Anderson by some means in 1905, but were forced to close it down with the enactment of Prohibition in 1920. The stocks from the distillery were transferred to the Wathen warehouses that year, and bottled by the American Medicinal Spirits Company. The American Medicinal Spirits Company was one of only around 30 distilling companies to survive Prohibition of the 434 that existed prior. Exploiting the medicinal loophole was the brainchild of Otto Wathen, an idea which continues to prove its value today in the persisting image of his still ever-popular portfolio, which eventually included Old Grand-dad, Old Taylor and Old Crow, among many others. The American Medicinal Spirits Company was eventually subsumed by National Distillers (the revived legitimate face of The Whiskey Trust), who along with Schenley, Hiram Walker and Seagram's, became the big 4 American whiskey companies following the eventual repeal of Prohibition. The National Distillers acquisition of the AMS Co meant the return for brands such as Old Ramshead, bottled here in 1930. Sadly, as with many others, the Anderson Distillery never returned, and was razed and never rebuilt following the repeal of Prohibition.

bottles.name: Pappy Van Winkle 20 Year Family Reserve 2012 Bottling
bottles.description: A 2012 bottling of Pappy Van Winkle 20 year old bourbon. This era of Pappy was crafted from barrels produced at the Stitzel-Weller distillery, the legendary closed distillery that produced Old Fitzgerald. This 2012 era release was bottled at Buffalo Trace after Julian Van Winkle moved his operations to there. This is the final year that Stitzel-Weller barrels could be included in the vatting as the distillery closed in 1992.

bottles.name: Van Winkle 12 Year Special Reserve Lot "B" 2015 Bottling
bottles.description: This quite fabulous 12 year old straight Kentucky Bourbon whiskey was produced at the Old Rip Van Winkle distillery and was bottled at 45.2% ABV for the Van Winkle Special Reserve series. Drawn from charred American oak barrels, this limited edition Bourbon is released in very small batches annually and is described as a full-bodied, smooth and mature whiskey. First released in 1991, this series had just one release from Lot A before Lot B followed on.

bottles.name: Bruichladdich 1985 32 Year Rare Cask Bourbon: Hidden Glory
bottles.description: A 1985 vintage special release from Bruichladdich crafted from spirit distilled by the Islay site's previous owners. Originally filled into quite inert 3rd fill bourbon barrels, the mature single malt was then recasked into fresh bourbon barrels. Bottled at 48.7% Abv as part of the Rare Cask series.

bottles.name: Thomas H. Handy 2017 Release
bottles.description: From the distilelr: "Named after the New Orleans bartender who first used rye whiskey in the Sazerac Cocktail, this uncut and unfiltered Straight Rye Whiskey is bottled directly from the barrel, just as it was over a century ago. Full of rich flavors, this authentic American rye whiskey is a symbol of the timeless history of New Orleans and the legacy of Thomas H. Handy."

bottles.name: Secret Speyside Macallan 1999 20 Year For Finest Whisky Berlin Sansibar
bottles.description: A 1999 vintage expression of a secret Speyside whisky confirmed to be sourced from the Macallan distillery. Matured for 20 years in a sherry cask it was bottled at 44.4% Abv for Finest Whisky Berlin by German independent bottler Sansibar. The label features a painting of the Macallan’s signature Easter Elchies house.

bottles.name: Imperial 1990 30 Year Single Cask #1048 Single Cask Nation
bottles.description: A 1990 vintage single cask expression of Imperial matured for 30 years in a bourbon barrel. Bottled in 2020 at 46.6% Abv by Single Cask Nation.

bottles.name: Orphan Barrel Rhetoric 24 Year - 2018
bottles.description: This is the fifth release of Rhetoric bourbon, part of Diageo's Orphan Barrel series. Since 2014, a new Rhetoric has been released annually, each with an additional year of age and a small bump in proofand price. Last years release was 23 years old, 45.3% ABV. 45.4% ABV Whatever the case, the current 24 year old exists from what one assumes are slowing dwindling bourbon stocks found in the old Stitzel-Weller warehouses in Louisville, Kentucky. It was distilled between 1990 and 1993 at the Bernheim distillery, historically located at 17th and Breckenridge in the same city and at the time owned by United Distillers. Rhetoric 24 Year Old Bourbon, bottled at 90.8 proof, has a mash bill thats 86% corn, 8% barley and 6% rye. Tasting notes suggest an aroma of rich vanilla oak, brown sugar and chocolate. Taste begins with orchard fruit accented with a hint of allspice, and gives way to a warming finish with of nutmeg and caramel notes.

bottles.name: Kavalan Solist Vinho Barrique 1 Liter
bottles.description:
A world whisky award winner, this is a wine barrique matured expression from Taiwanese producer Kavalan. The solist barrique is pulled from a single barrel and bottled at cask strength. These barrels vary in age, vintage and Abv but usually have less than 200 bottles produced per barrel.

A quick way to identify the vintage and bottling date for a solist release is the cask number and serial code on the rear. The first 2 digits of the cask number reference the year distilled, with the laser code on the rear referencing the bottling date. 

Inspect each asset closely and you can identify this information for each cask!

bottles.name: Foursquare 12 Year Master Series No 1 For Total Wine
bottles.description: A 12 year old expression of single blended rum from the Foursquare distillery in Barbados. This vatting of casks was matured in both bourbon and sherry before being blended exclusively for Total Wine in the US.

bottles.name: Bowmore 17 Year
bottles.description: A delightful 17 year old Islay malt that was distilled at Bowmore and released in the 1990’s in this iconic screen printed label. The liquid is beautifully balanced with great a complexity of citrus  chocolate and brine mingling with the peat.

bottles.name: Ichiro's Malt & Grain World Blended Whiskey
bottles.description: A lovely blended whisky from Japan created by Ichiro Akuto, the Japanese whisky extraordinaire. This particular gem is made with both malt and grain whisky from Japan as well as (possibly) some whisky from other countries too - the label describes it as a "worldwide blended whisky."

bottles.name: Bunnahabhain 2008 12 Year Single Hogshead #1158 For Norfolk Whisky Group Signatory Vintage
bottles.description: This is an independent bottling of spirit distilled by Bunnahabhain by Signatory Vintage. Matured for 12 years in a first fill sherry butt, this dram was distilled in 2007 and bottled in 2019 at cask strength with no coloring or filtering. It was bottled from cask #1158.
